closureNotes.outcome: Production Google OAuth login restored 2026-06-04 21:19 PDT. Root cause: BW item 301125de (ECTROPY_PROD_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET) was written 2026-03-16 to a value ending ...ZlSsh; GCP OAuth client secret created 2026-03-18 ended ****hRsy — never matched from day one (~80 days). Fix path: L4 rotated BW via desktop UI per memory #9 (operator updates BW UI directly); command-substitution propagated BW to GH (TF_VAR_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET) per CRED-GROUND-TRUTH 2026-04-18; re-fired deploy-production-app.yml --ref ed6fc3396952caf43594e71d1c0334c6d4ed0e6e; TF apply rewrote production.env in Spaces ectropy-production-configs; config-sync propagated to blue+green droplets ~21:18 PDT; Watchtower restarted containers; login verified working at https://ectropy.ai 21:19 PDT. Closure PR #303 landed SPEC.md + TRUTH-DELIVERED.json + filed+closed FU-EB-PROD-OAUTH-CLIENT-SECRET-2026-03-16. Three learn-from FUs filed in PR #301: FU-EB-BW-OAUTH-SECRET-INITIAL-WRITE-NEVER-MATCHED-GOOGLE-1, FU-EB-OAUTH-SECRET-ENVSCOPED-NAMING-1, FU-EB-DEPLOY-PROD-APP-HEALTH-VALIDATION-CURL-NO-FOLLOW-1.
closureNotes.overrideRecord: EB executed this fix without SR-anchor-first per cross-repo doctrine memory #24. Alpha environment, production OAuth login failing on first verified L4 attempt post-parity-deploy, fix path already understood. L4-authorized real-time 2026-06-04 21:00-21:19 PDT. Audit trail: Slack #luhtech-agents-comms message ts=1780633175.710469 (2026-06-04 21:19:35 PDT). This is the 7th+ in-band confirmation of FU-SR-PROCESS-EB-PRE-SR-SHIP-PATTERN-1. SR retro-anchor + TRUTH-DELIVERED land together per established pattern (d-2026-06-05-eb-resource-access-coherence-pass precedent). Substrate-correction (memory #25) decisive: initial five-whys assumed GCP rotation drift based on internal env-chain self-consistency; L4 forced GCP Console read which surfaced the actual root cause. Lesson: internal-chain self-consistency is necessary but not five-whys-sufficient for OAuth secret debugging.
